test-case.description: marks readiness as not_ready when blockers exist
test-case.name: AKS Automatic readiness aggregation.marks readiness as not_ready when blockers exist

test-case.description: treats latest image tags as an AKS Automatic blocker with deny behavior
test-case.name: AKS Automatic readiness aggregation.treats latest image tags as an AKS Automatic blocker with deny behavior

test-case.description: marks readiness as ready_with_changes when only warnings exist
test-case.name: AKS Automatic readiness aggregation.marks readiness as ready_with_changes when only warnings exist

test-case.description: treats missing resource requests as an AKS Automatic blocker
test-case.name: AKS Automatic readiness aggregation.treats missing resource requests as an AKS Automatic blocker

test-case.description: surfaces seccomp not configured as a warning
test-case.name: AKS Automatic readiness aggregation.surfaces seccomp not configured as a warning

test-case.description: groups spread-constraint failures into an AKS Automatic blocker action
test-case.name: AKS Automatic readiness aggregation.groups spread-constraint failures into an AKS Automatic blocker action

test-case.description: groups duplicate service selectors into an AKS Automatic blocker action
test-case.name: AKS Automatic readiness aggregation.groups duplicate service selectors into an AKS Automatic blocker action

test-case.description: tracks AKS alignment separately from readiness
test-case.name: AKS Automatic readiness aggregation.tracks AKS alignment separately from readiness

test-case.description: resolves pod findings to owning workload and helm metadata
test-case.name: AKS Automatic readiness aggregation.resolves pod findings to owning workload and helm metadata
AKS Automatic readiness aggregation.writes an action-plan HTML artifact

test-case.description: skips readiness when the AKS cluster sku is Automatic
test-case.name: AKS Automatic readiness aggregation.skips readiness when the AKS cluster sku is Automatic
Invoke-KubeBuddy.HTML Report mode.Calls Get-KubeData and Generate-K8sHTMLReport on -HtmlReport

test-case.description: Writes an error if the HTML file was not created
test-case.name: Invoke-KubeBuddy.HTML Report mode.Writes an error if the HTML file was not created
Radar integration parameters.Expose Radar flags on Invoke-KubeBuddy

test-case.description: Enables Radar when upload flag is set even if config disabled
test-case.name: Radar settings resolver.Enables Radar when upload flag is set even if config disabled

test-case.description: reads CSV_REPORT from the container environment
test-case.name: Docker entrypoint report forwarding.reads CSV_REPORT from the container environment

test-case.description: includes CSV_REPORT in the required report-format validation
test-case.name: Docker entrypoint report forwarding.includes CSV_REPORT in the required report-format validation
Docker entrypoint report forwarding.forwards CsvReport to Invoke-KubeBuddy
